pr.title: Record: Phrase Cache + N-gram Backoff + EMA-GPU (val_bpb=0.2722)

output.summary: Combines shared multi-order n-gram cache with long phrase matching, entropy-adaptive mixing, GPU EMA, and XSA-enhanced GELU-pre-enriched model for efficient scoring.
techniques: Phrase + multi-order n-gram caching with entropy-adaptive alpha
GPU EMA speedup alongside GELU pre-enrichment and XSA layers
Shared two-phase cache construction before phrase backoff
